fields.name: loan_disbursement_instructions
fields.description: Instructions for loan disbursements, one entry per instruction

children.name: instruction_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan disbursement instruction

children.name: disbursement_amount
children.description: Amount to be disbursed for the loan

children.name: disbursement_method
children.description: Method of loan disbursement (e.g. Bank Transfer)

children.name: destination_account
children.description: Account number where the loan will be disbursed

children.name: destination_bank_code
children.description: Bank code of the destination account

children.name: purpose
children.description: Purpose of the loan disbursement (e.g. Working Capital)

children.name: loan_term_months
children.description: Number of months the loan will be outstanding

children.name: status
children.description: Current status of the loan disbursement (e.g. APPROVED)

children.name: created_by
children.description: User who created the loan disbursement instruction

children.name: created_date
children.description: Date and time when the loan disbursement instruction was created

children.name: approved_by
children.description: User who approved the loan disbursement instruction (if applicable)

children.name: approved_date
children.description: Date and time when the loan disbursement instruction was approved (if applicable)

children.name: remarks
children.description: Additional comments or remarks about the loan disbursement instruction
